html.htmlText:
Work & Relax: Modern 2BR Near BCN & Costa Brava

Newly renovated 2BR apartment in peaceful Premià de Mar. Perfect for remote work with high-speed Wi-Fi and AC. Includes a private patio for quiet evenings. The perfect Mediterranean home base.

Escape the crowds and enjoy large beaches and the modern Marina (gym, dining, shops).

Effortless travel: a 10-min walk to the train connects you to central Barcelona in 30 min or north to the stunning Costa Brava.

Experience the perfect "workation" in this bright, fully renovated 2-bedroom home. Designed for modern living, the apartment features a sleek open kitchen and a comfortable living area equipped with full air conditioning and fast internet. After work, unwind on your private patio—a secluded spot perfect for morning coffee or a glass of wine in total tranquility.

The Location
Located in the charming town of Premià de Mar, you are far from the city noise but perfectly connected to the action.
• The Beach & Marina: A 10-minute stroll leads you to expansive, uncrowded beaches and a modern Marina. Here, you’ll find everything you need: a high-end gym, grocery stores, and a variety of seaside restaurants.
• Easy Transit: The train station is just 10 minutes away on foot. The scenic coastal train takes you directly to the heart of Barcelona in just 30 minutes.

Explore the Region
This is the ideal gateway for explorers. Use the excellent rail links to head south for a day in the city or head north to discover the famous hidden coves and crystal-clear waters of the Maresme and Costa Brava. Enjoy the authentic Catalan lifestyle with all the modern amenities you require.

Spain – National registration number
ESFCNT00000809400065159300000000000000000000000000009

Catalonia – Regional registration number
Exempt
